items.briefing:
A new study warns that 1 in 10 Australian organisations could lose control of their systems if AI-related login credentials are exposed — and separate reporting confirms that many Australian businesses are struggling to properly manage who (or what) has access to their AI tools. As organisations adopt AI more quickly, the risks of poorly secured AI accounts and agents are growing, and governance isn't keeping pace.

**Practical tip:** If your organisation uses any AI tools or services, check that those accounts are protected with strong, unique passwords and multi-factor authentication — just like any other important system.
